215 S Midvale Blvd, Madison, WI 53705, USA

Three trees of apparently the same variety. One is on its last legs, the others are fine. Decent sweet flavor. Probably not tart enough to be ideal for pie or cider. I don't know specific varieties so can't speculate. Bearing well.
